description: Marketing technology and advertising technology companies focused on digital marketing automation, advertising platforms, analytics, attribution, and customer data management. Encompasses demand-side platforms, customer data platforms, attribution tools, programmatic advertising, and marketing automation solutions.

pain_points.pain: Attribution chaos - inability to accurately track which marketing channels drive conversions
pain_points.context: Multi-touch attribution models are breaking down as privacy regulations tighten and third-party cookies deprecate

pain_points.pain: Cookie deprecation threatening existing targeting and measurement strategies
pain_points.context: Chrome's third-party cookie phase-out requires fundamental shifts in data collection and audience targeting approaches

pain_points.pain: Ad fraud draining budget with fake clicks and impressions
pain_points.context: Estimated 20-30% of digital ad spend lost to fraudulent traffic and bot activity

pain_points.pain: Platform dependency on Meta and Google creating business risk
pain_points.context: Algorithm changes, policy updates, or account suspensions can devastate revenue overnight

pain_points.pain: ROI measurement becoming increasingly difficult across fragmented channels
pain_points.context: Customer journeys span 6-8 touchpoints across multiple platforms, making true attribution nearly impossible

pain_points.pain: First-party data collection and activation gaps
pain_points.context: Companies struggle to build robust first-party data infrastructure as third-party data becomes unreliable

pain_points.pain: CTV/OTT measurement fragmentation across streaming platforms
pain_points.context: Each streaming platform has different measurement standards, making cross-platform comparison difficult
Increased competition and privacy changes driving up cost per thousand impressions across major platforms

buying_triggers: Failed campaign with unexplained poor performance
New CMO or VP Marketing joins and wants to prove impact
Board asking for better marketing ROI accountability
Major platform policy change (iOS ATT, cookie deprecation)
Competitor gaining market share through better targeting
Series A/B funding requiring marketing scalability
Q4 planning season with budget allocation decisions
budget_cycle: Annual planning in Q4 for following year, with quarterly reallocation common. Marketing teams often have discretionary budget for tools under $25K that can be approved within the quarter.
regulatory_concerns: GDPR compliance for EU audience targeting
CCPA/CPRA data privacy requirements in California
State-level privacy laws proliferating across US

terminology.definition: Return On Ad Spend - revenue generated per dollar spent on advertising, typically expressed as a ratio (e.g., 4:1 means $4 revenue per $1 spent)
terminology.usage_context: The primary success metric for performance marketing. 'We need at least 3:1 ROAS to justify continued spend on this channel.'

terminology.definition: Cost Per Mille - the cost to reach 1,000 impressions or ad views
terminology.usage_context: Used for brand awareness campaigns and media buying negotiations. 'CPMs on Meta jumped 40% this quarter.'

terminology.definition: Cost Per Acquisition - the cost to acquire one customer or conversion
terminology.usage_context: Critical for evaluating channel efficiency. 'Our CPA on Google is $45 but only $28 on TikTok.'

terminology.definition: Cost Per Lead - the cost to generate one qualified lead
terminology.usage_context: B2B marketing benchmark. 'LinkedIn CPLs are higher but lead quality justifies the premium.'

terminology.definition: Marketing Qualified Lead - a lead that marketing has vetted as meeting basic qualification criteria and worth sales follow-up
terminology.usage_context: Handoff point between marketing and sales. 'We generated 500 MQLs but only 50 converted to SQLs.'

terminology.definition: Sales Qualified Lead - a lead that sales has accepted and confirmed as a genuine opportunity worth pursuing
terminology.usage_context: Revenue team alignment metric. 'Our MQL to SQL conversion rate dropped to 12% this month.'

terminology.definition: Attribution model that distributes conversion credit across multiple touchpoints in the customer journey, rather than first or last touch only
terminology.usage_context: Analytics sophistication indicator. 'We moved from last-click to multi-touch attribution and discovered email was undervalued.'

terminology.definition: Data collected directly from your own customers and website visitors, as opposed to third-party data purchased from external sources
terminology.usage_context: Privacy-era priority. 'Our first-party data strategy is critical now that third-party cookies are going away.'

terminology.definition: The phasing out of third-party cookies by browsers, eliminating traditional cross-site tracking and retargeting capabilities
terminology.usage_context: Industry disruption topic. 'Cookie deprecation is forcing us to completely rethink our retargeting strategy.'

terminology.definition: Connected TV/Over-The-Top - streaming video content delivered over the internet, bypassing traditional cable distribution
terminology.usage_context: Emerging channel discussion. 'We're shifting 20% of TV budget to CTV for better targeting and measurement.'

terminology.definition: Automated buying and selling of digital advertising through real-time bidding and algorithmic optimization
terminology.usage_context: Media buying approach. 'We run 80% of display through programmatic to optimize in real-time.'

terminology.definition: Demand-Side Platform - technology platform that allows advertisers to buy digital ad inventory across multiple exchanges through a single interface
terminology.usage_context: Ad buying infrastructure. 'We consolidated our programmatic buying onto a single DSP for better frequency management.'

terminology.definition: Customer Data Platform - software that unifies customer data from multiple sources into a single, coherent customer profile for activation
terminology.usage_context: Data infrastructure discussion. 'Our CDP finally connects our email, website, and purchase data into unified profiles.'

terminology.definition: The time period after an ad interaction during which a conversion will be credited to that ad
terminology.usage_context: Measurement methodology. 'Meta's 7-day click attribution window means we're missing conversions that take longer.'

terminology.definition: The additional conversions or revenue that advertising generates above what would have happened organically without the ad spend
terminology.usage_context: Advanced measurement approach. 'Incrementality testing showed our brand campaigns drive 30% lift over baseline.'

common_objections.objection: How do I know this will actually improve our ROAS?
common_objections.underlying_concern: Previous tools promised ROI improvements but failed to deliver measurable results, creating skepticism about marketing technology claims
common_objections.effective_response_approach: Offer a paid pilot with specific success metrics defined upfront. Share case studies with similar company profiles showing exact before/after ROAS improvements. Propose a 60-day measurement period with agreed-upon benchmarks.

common_objections.objection: We've already invested heavily in our current stack and can't justify another integration
common_objections.underlying_concern: Marketing tech sprawl has created integration fatigue and fear of adding complexity. Team is stretched thin managing existing tools.
common_objections.effective_response_approach: Lead with integration simplicity - show native connectors to their existing tools. Quantify time savings that offset integration effort. Position as consolidation opportunity rather than addition.

common_objections.objection: What happens to our data? Privacy regulations are a minefield.
common_objections.underlying_concern: Legal and compliance teams are increasingly scrutinizing marketing tools for GDPR/CCPA violations. CMO doesn't want to be responsible for a data breach.
common_objections.effective_response_approach: Lead with privacy certifications (SOC 2, GDPR compliance). Explain data handling in plain terms. Offer to include legal team in technical review. Provide sample DPA and privacy documentation upfront.

common_objections.objection: We're locked into a contract with [competitor] for another 8 months
common_objections.underlying_concern: Budget is committed and switching costs seem high. Don't want to run parallel systems.
common_objections.effective_response_approach: Offer extended trial that aligns with contract end. Propose running as complement rather than replacement initially. Calculate total cost of staying vs. switching including opportunity cost.

common_objections.objection: My team doesn't have bandwidth to learn another tool right now
common_objections.underlying_concern: Team is already overwhelmed with existing responsibilities. Fear of implementation dragging on and creating more work.
common_objections.effective_response_approach: Offer white-glove onboarding with dedicated success manager. Show time-to-value metrics (e.g., 'most teams see results in 2 weeks'). Provide training resources and certification programs.

common_objections.objection: How does this work as cookies go away? We need future-proof solutions.
common_objections.underlying_concern: Investment in tools that rely on deprecated technology would be wasted. Need confidence solution will remain effective post-cookie.
common_objections.effective_response_approach: Explain first-party data and privacy-safe measurement architecture. Show roadmap for privacy sandbox integration. Demonstrate current customers successfully operating in cookieless environments.

switching_barriers: Historical data and reporting continuity concerns
Existing integrations with CRM and sales tools
Team training and familiarity with current interface
Custom dashboards and reports that would need rebuilding
Fear of measurement gaps during transition

scenario_templates.template: You're a {role} at a {company_size} marketing analytics company. {trigger_event}. Your main concern is {pain_point}, and your CEO is asking why marketing can't prove its impact on revenue.

You're a {role} at a {company_size} AdTech startup. Your largest client just asked about your cookie deprecation strategy. {trigger_event}. You need a solution that addresses {pain_point} before your next QBR.

You're a {role} leading growth at a {company_size} MarTech company. {trigger_event}. The board wants to see {pain_point} resolved before approving next quarter's budget, and you have 3 weeks to present a plan.

You're a {role} at a {company_size} programmatic advertising platform. Meta just changed their API again, breaking your attribution. {trigger_event}. You need to address {pain_point} without disrupting live campaigns.

You're a {role} who just joined a {company_size} performance marketing agency. The previous marketing stack is a mess with 12 different tools. {trigger_event}. Your priority is fixing {pain_point} to prove your value in the first 90 days.
